    234 -            return
    235 -        path_changed = row["materialized_path"] != rel
    236 -        if (
    218 +        file_changed = row["file_hash"] != file_hash
    219 +        needs_ingest = (
    220              file_changed
    238 -            or path_changed
    239 -            or row["sync_state"] in {"parse_error", "missing_file", "conflict"}
    240 -        ):
    221 +            or row["materialized_path"] != rel
    222 +            or row["sync_state"] != "synced"
    223 +        )
    224 +        if needs_ingest:
    225              dbmod.upsert_plan(
        ⋮
    230                  file_hash=file_hash,
    247 -                last_materialized_hash=file_hash,
    231                  sync_state="synced",
    249 -                create_revision=file_changed,
    232 +                create_revision=(rendered_hash != row["body_hash"]),
    233                  revision_source="file",
    234              )
    252 -        elif row["file_hash"] != file_hash or row["sync_state"] != "synced":
    253 -            dbmod.mark_plan_sync_state(self.db, row["name"], "synced", file_hash=file_hash)
    235
        ⋮
    251              UPDATE plans
    271 -               SET body_hash = ?, last_materialized_hash = ?, updated_at = ?
    252 +               SET body_hash = ?, updated_at = ?
    253               WHERE name = ?
    254              """,
    274 -            (h, h, datetime.utcnow().isoformat(timespec="seconds"), plan.name),
    255 +            (h, datetime.utcnow().isoformat(timespec="seconds"), plan.name),
    256          )

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

• The core reconcile logic is swapped now: file hash against stored file hash, no DB-changed branch, no conflict state. I’m moving through schema and migration next so the runtime and
  existing database shape match the new model.

• Working (1m 42s • esc to interrupt)


› Find and fix a bug in @filename

  gpt-5.4 high · ~/Documents/code/murder
